column10: Description
Three vibrant African women, each a world of color and pattern. Bold silhouettes, handmade acrylic on canvas. Sold as a complete set.
A charming textured scene ? blue door, flowering tree, window box blooms, a little white chair. Mixed media with dimensional elements on canvas.
A lively squirrel perched on a sweeping branch, surrounded by lush green leaves and pink blossoms. Handmade acrylic on canvas.
An explosive abstract composition ? vivid feather-like forms erupting from a dark background. Handmade acrylic on canvas.
Two kingfisher birds, mosaic and diamond painting, finished with découpaged resin coat. Pressed leaves and botanicals border.
A mesmerizing mandala centered around a radiant lotus flower, bursting with gold, red, blue and black. Handmade acrylic on canvas.
A vivid waterfall cascading in full rainbow colors, lush green cliffs framing the scene. Handmade acrylic on canvas.
A serene night seascape ? moonlit ocean, lone palm tree, deep blue starry sky. Handmade acrylic on canvas.
A woman's profile blooming with flowers and vines against a bold rainbow geometric background. Handmade acrylic on canvas.
A magical tree whose branches are made entirely of pink and red hearts, glowing against a cosmic sky. Handmade acrylic on canvas.
Collab with Ahmed Hany. A cloaked figure on an otherworldly desert beneath orbiting planets. Available in different color themes.
A magnificent tree in intricate dot-work and organic patterns ? rich amber tones, sprawling roots. Handmade acrylic on canvas.
Collab with Ahmed Hany. Raw portrait of a human consumed by life's weight. Available in different color themes.
Collab with Ahmed Hany. Mixed media ? acrylic paste, UV resin. Commentary on screen obsession. Available in different color themes.
Collab with Ahmed Hany. Chaotic joyful explosion of faces and characters. Handmade acrylic on canvas.
Native American headdress engraved on illuminated plexi glass. USB powered wood LED base.
Two hands in 3D wire-mesh illusion engraved on illuminated plexi glass. USB powered.
Clay octopus hand-sculpted on a glass bottle with fairy lights inside. Battery powered. SOLD ? custom available.
Horse head with mandala florals engraved on illuminated plexi glass. USB powered.
Woman merging into a windswept tree, birds taking flight. Engraved on illuminated plexi glass. USB powered.
Majestic lion portrait with elaborate mandala mane. Engraved on illuminated plexi glass. USB powered.
Powerful horse in full gallop with swirling mandala patterns. Engraved on illuminated plexi glass. USB powered.
V for Vendetta tribute. Figure in dot-work patterns. Engraved on illuminated plexi glass. USB powered.
Striking owl portrait with mandala feather details. Engraved on illuminated plexi glass. USB powered.
Joker-inspired face in flowing parallel lines with engraved quote on wood base. SOLD ? custom available.
Forest waterfall scene in fine line detail. Engraved on illuminated plexi glass. USB powered.
UV reactive rolling tray. Magnetic side compartment, 4 joint holders, packing tool included. Fully handmade.
Hand-carved rasta tribute tray. 3 joint holders, magnetic One Love companion box. Fully handmade.
Leo from That 70s Show tribute. Resin coated, magnetic grinder dish. SOLD ? custom available.
Woman with feather headdress on pearl resin finished wooden piece. Wall decoration or decorative tray.
Handmade resin puzzle piece charm. Available as necklace, leather cord, keychain or bracelet.
Fiery red glitter oval with golden smiley faces. Available as necklace, leather cord, keychain or bracelet.
Terracotta orange flower in resin with silver metal frame. Available as necklace, leather cord, keychain or bracelet.
Wire and crystal bead sculpture on rare natural crystal base. SOLD ? custom versions available.
Hand carved yin yang with poured black resin on one side. Wall decoration.
Three skull designs: Day of the Dead, Blue Crystal Bandana, Black & Gold. Handmade resin, customisable.
Clear resin circle with gold wire spirals embedded. Customisable in wire color, resin tint and size.
Hand painted sneakers, sealed and coated. SOLD ? custom orders any design, any size.
Floral mandala painted fabric slip-ons, sealed and coated. SOLD ? custom orders any design.
Electric color block painted sneakers. SOLD ? custom orders any design, any size.
